# Prestigo

> Premium chauffeur service in Prague, Czech Republic. Airport transfers, intercity routes across Central Europe, corporate accounts. All-Mercedes fleet, fixed pricing, 24/7.

## Key Pages

- [Prague Airport Transfer](/services/airport-transfer): From €49, meet-and-greet, 60-min free wait, flight tracking.
- [Intercity Routes](/routes): Vienna (€485), Berlin (€580), Munich (€635), Budapest (€885), 25+ destinations.
- [FAQ](/faq): Booking, pricing, cancellation, vehicle questions.
- [Prague Airport Guide](/guides/prague-airport-to-city-center): Full 2026 comparison of all transport options from PRG.
- [Corporate Accounts](/corporate): Monthly invoicing, dedicated account manager, priority dispatch.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy)
